summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpenClaw management system including new ClawHub marketplace, Hooks/Webhooks management, Session transcript viewer, and Config validation features. All backend APIs working 100% and frontend functionality tested successfully.
passed_tests: All backend CRUD operations (agents, skills, tools, models, channels, sessions, cron)
ClawHub marketplace: 16 skills loaded, search functionality, category filtering, install/uninstall workflow
Hooks management: config summary display, create/edit/delete hook mappings, toggle enable/disable
Session transcript viewer: opens dialog, displays message history, proper role indicators
Config validation: validates valid JSON, shows errors for invalid JSON, shows warnings for unknown keys
Navigation: all sidebar navigation items working including new ClawHub and Hooks pages
Existing functionality: dashboard, all CRUD pages, gateway status, sidebar collapse/expand
Dashboard stats and gateway status reporting correctly
